arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: There is a mouth-watering Carabao Cup quarter-final clash in North London tonight as Tottenham play Manchester United. Spurs got back to winning ways at the weekend as they put five past a despondent Southampton side. Ange Postecoglou will have Yves Bissouma back at his disposal following suspension but Rodrigo Bentancur still has two games left […] The post Tottenham vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Journalist says he’s spoken to Tottenham player about transfer – Spurs stance on move revealed
arts.sum: Corinthians, Palmeiras and Vasco da Gama have become the latest clubs to be credited with interest in Tottenham Hotspur’s Richarlison. Journalist Thiago Asmar, popularly known as Pilhado, has taken to X, formerly known as Twitter, to report on the forward. arts.ttl: ‘He’s one of us’: he may be ready to leave but Marcus Rashford is still loved in his home city
arts.sum: The Manchester boy who joined United aged seven holds a special place in the heart of many fans, though others accept his time to leave has come Although Marcus Rashford had moved closer to the exit at Manchester United, there was still a buzz around Button Lane primary school. “The noise of the children coming in was louder,” sports coach Chris Walker said. “Some don’t want to come into school, but this morning it was: ‘What did you get from Marcus?’” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Roy Keane warns Marcus Rashford he may NEVER get back to his best - and shows contempt for 'long' exit statement - as he calls out Man United star being 'distracted by watches and off-field stuff'
arts.sum: Roy Keane has warned Marcus Rashford that he may never return to his best form after the forward revealed he is ready to leave his boyhood club Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Saudi Arabia's stance on Marcus Rashford 'revealed' as forward 'eyes January move'
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford is reportedly attracting attention from the Saudi Pro League ahead of a likely January move.

arts.ttl: Harry Amass: What does Man United future hold amid imminent arrival of new signing
arts.sum: Manchester United’s injury problems at left-back have been well-documented over the last two years but could the solution to their issues already be at Old Trafford? Harry Amass has...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou claims he has a HARDER job than Keir Starmer - as Tottenham boss jokes he has 'an election every weekend' ahead of crucial Man United clash
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: 'People will say managers have always been sacked,' Postecoglou said. 'I just think it has gone beyond that now where we forget there's a human being involved'.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville’s comments speak volumes about Marcus Rashford situation at Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has made it clear that he wants to leave Manchester United, and Gary Neville believes the forward is now in the 'last chance saloon' at Old Trafford if he were to stay

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer news: La Liga title challengers 'eyeing loan move for Man United star'
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford could allegedly join Atletico Madrid on loan during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Tottenham matches Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven could miss with injury after update
arts.sum: With Romero and Van de Ven sidelined until January, the duo are expected to miss several important matches for Tottenham, starting with Thursday's clash against Man United in the Carabao Cup. The centre-backs will also be unavailable for Sunday's Premier League fixture against Liverpool in North London. "I think both will be in the new year," Postecoglou told reporters on Thursday when asked about Van de Ven and Romero's injuries.
